ItacAcademyItem.Name: Sarottiana (Accademia)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: Relevant to the history of this Academy is also Porzio, Dissertationes, I, 1736, pp. 291-292, which reports about a discussion held in the Academy on the bad reputation of practical medicine. This volume is not in British Library collections. See Dini, Filosofia della natura, medicina, religione. Lucantonio Porzio (Milan: Franco Angeli 1985). Information about the Academy and its library, is in Martinelli, Ritratto di Venezia (1684).
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
